creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
The online version of the Committers' Guide has a nice facility to choose
between  [ Split HTML / Single HTML ]  which the Porters' Guide lacks so 
far.

It would be lovely if we could get that for
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/index.html
as well.

(Noticed while mentoring salvadore@ when I went to double check things.)
